message:
feat(gateway): integrate conflict stats and fleet token metrics into analytics

Connects quality metrics to real conflict data and adds fleet-wide
token averaging for efficiency comparisons.

Changes to agent-analytics.service.ts:

1. Import getAgentConflictStats from reservation service
2. Add getFleetAverageTokensPerTask():
   - Batch query for 7-day token usage across all agents
   - Calculates average (promptTokens + responseTokens) per task
   - 30-second cache via analyticsCache

3. Update getQualityMetrics():
   - Replace hardcoded conflictRate: 0 with real conflict stats
   - Replace hardcoded conflictsResolved: 0 with actual count
   - Calls getAgentConflictStats(agentId) for real data

Removes TODO comments:
- "TODO: Get from reservation/conflict service" - now implemented

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
